landing.title: Automated Medical Shift Scheduling
landing.subtitle: Stop Wasting Hours on Shift Schedules
landing.description: Our system creates fair medical shifts in seconds — built by a MD to eliminate hours of manual scheduling.

features.title: Everything You Need for Efficient Scheduling

teamManagement.title: Team Management
teamManagement.description: Create teams, add participants, and track experience levels for fair scheduling.

customShifts.title: Custom Shifts
customShifts.description: Define custom shift hours and let team members mark availability.

aiScheduling.title: AI-Powered Scheduling
aiScheduling.description: Generate optimal monthly schedules based on availability, experience, and preferences.

export.title: Export Options
export.description: Basic export options for easy sharing and printing.

notifications.title: Change Notifications
notifications.description: Automatic email notifications for shift changes and schedule updates.

hostWorkflow.title: How It Works for Hosts
hostWorkflow.subtitle: A simple workflow to get your teams scheduled efficiently

step1.title: Get Started
step1.description: Click the "Create Team" button on your dashboard to begin setting up your medical team.

step2.title: Configure Team Details
step2.description: Set up basic information such as team name and an optional description.

step3.title: Define Shifts
step3.description: Configure shift types with time slots and worker requirements for your team.

step4.title: Manage Your Teams
step4.description: Once created, access team management options, set deadlines, view schedules, and check team availability all from one place.

step5.title: Invite Team Members
step5.description: Send email invitations to team members to join your team and start marking their availability.

step6.title: Set Scheduling Constraints
step6.description: Configure AI-powered scheduling constraints including max consecutive days, max days per month, and custom rules to guide the scheduling algorithm.

participantWorkflow.title: How It Works for Participants
participantWorkflow.subtitle: A straightforward process to join your team and manage your shifts

step1.title: Receive Invitation
step1.description: Your team host will send you an email invitation to join their team. Click the registration link in the email to accept the invitation and begin the sign-up process.

step2.title: Complete Registration
step2.description: Fill out the simple registration form with your name and create a secure password. Your email is pre-filled from the invitation, making the process quick and easy.

step3.title: Access Your Dashboard
step3.description: Once registered, you'll see your intuitive dashboard with quick access to set availability, request shift changes, and view your schedule. Everything you need is just one click away.

step4.title: Mark Your Availability
step4.description: Select your team and month, then click on any date and shift combination to cycle through availability statuses: Available, Priority, Unavailable, Vacation, or Conference. The system makes it easy to set your preferences for the entire month.

step5.title: Save Your Preferences
step5.description: Once you've marked all your availability preferences, click "Save Availability" to submit them. You can also save as a draft if you need to come back and finish later.

step6.title: Request Shift Changes
step6.description: If you need to swap or change an assigned shift, use the shift change request feature. Select your current shift, choose a preferred date and shift type, and the system will help find a team member to swap with. Track all your requests in one place.

additionalInfo.line1: Designed for hospitals, clinics, and medical residency teams.
additionalInfo.line2: Secure authentication and role-based access control included.

comingNext.title: What's Coming Next
comingNext.subtitle: We're just getting started — here's what we're building next:

mobileApps.title: Mobile apps (iOS & Android)
mobileApps.description: Access your schedule on the go

feedback.title: Have a request?
feedback.description: Tell us directly from your dashboard — we build based on your needs.

dashboard.noShiftsDesc: Here you will see your shifts when they are assigned to you
dashboard.noNotificationsDesc: You'll see shift change requests here when they come in

donation.line1: If AISchedulator helps you or your team, you can support the development.
donation.line2: Every donation helps keep the project alive and fund new features. ❤️

availability.title: Set Availability
availability.noTeamTitle: You are not assigned to any team yet
availability.noTeamDesc: Please contact your administrator to be added to a team before setting availability.
availability.legendDesc: Click on any date/shift combination to set your availability. Dates you have not edited yet count as available.

range.hintAll: Every shift column gets this availability for days in the range (only on days where that shift applies).
range.hintShift: Only days where this shift appears in the grid are updated (same as tapping each cell).
range.ariaAll: Set availability for a date range for all shifts

copy.title: Copy previous month
copy.desc: Load saved availability from {prev} into {current}. Overwrites overlapping dates in the grid for shift types that still exist.
copy.dayOfMonthHelp: The 10th maps to the 10th. Days that do not exist in this month are skipped (e.g. 31st in a 30-day month).
copy.weekdayHelp: Matches by weekday order in the month (e.g. 2nd Tuesday → 2nd Tuesday). Skipped if that occurrence does not exist.
copy.empty: No saved availability found for last month.
copy.success: Availability copied from last month. Review and save when ready.
copy.failed: Could not copy availability. Please try again.

dragFill.lead: Tap a shift cell to cycle. Pick a brush below, then hold (~0.2s) or drag to paint. Scroll the page using the date column on the left.

bulk.title: Quick: mark unavailable
bulk.desc: Applies to the month shown below. Only cells that appear in the grid are updated.
bulk.shiftHint: Select one or more shift columns for this team.
bulk.weekdayHint: Select days; every shift column is set unavailable on those days in this month.

status.priorityDesc: I prefer to work this shift
status.notSetDesc: Explicit no preference after cycling past other states

alerts.draftSaved: Availability saved as draft! You can continue editing later.

shiftChange.title: Shift Change Requests
shiftChange.requestDesc: Request to change one of your assigned shifts with another team member
shiftChange.noShiftsForTeam: No upcoming shifts available for this team
shiftChange.showAvailableDates: Click here to see available dates
shiftChange.howItWorksDesc: Select a date when someone else in your team is working, and choose the shift type you want. The system will find a team member with that shift and send them a swap request.
shiftChange.noShiftsAnyTeam: No shifts available for your teams
shiftChange.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why you need to change this shift...
shiftChange.pendingDesc: Shift change requests that need your response
shiftChange.myRequestsDesc: Track the status of your shift change requests

confirm.title: Please confirm your shift change request
confirm.footer: The system will find a team member with the requested shift and send them a swap request. Do you want to proceed?

alerts.userNotAuthenticated: User not authenticated. Please log in again.
alerts.selectCurrentShift: Please select the shift you want to change.
alerts.selectPreferredDate: Please select your preferred new date.
alerts.selectPreferredShift: Please select your preferred new shift time.
alerts.futureDateOnly: Please select a future date for your preferred shift.
alerts.shiftDataMissing: Shift data not found. Please try again.
alerts.noShiftsAvailable: No shifts available. Please check your team assignments.
alerts.availableDatesNext30: Available dates in the next 30 days
alerts.noScheduledShiftsNext30: No scheduled shifts found for your team in the next 30 days.
alerts.noShiftsOnDatePrefix: No shifts are currently scheduled for your team on
alerts.noShiftsOnDateBody:
This could mean:

1. The schedule hasn't been generated for this date yet
2. No team members are assigned to work on this date
3. The date is outside the current schedule period

Please contact your team host to schedule shifts for this date, or choose a different date.
alerts.noAssignmentsOnDate: No one in your team is assigned to any shifts on
alerts.noMatchingShiftPrefix: No one in your team is assigned to a
alerts.pickDifferentShiftOrDate: Please select a different shift type or date.
alerts.noShiftDetails: No shift details could be retrieved for the available assignments. This might be a data access issue.
alerts.createRequestFailed: Failed to create shift change request
alerts.acceptSuccess: Shift change request accepted and shifts swapped successfully!

schedule.title: My Team Schedule
schedule.currentScheduleDesc: This schedule was generated considering everyone's availability and preferences
schedule.shiftTypesDescC: with varying hours depending on the day of the week.
schedule.shiftTypesDescD: Each column represents a consolidated shift type that may have different time ranges for different days.
schedule.teamNotFoundDesc: Team not found or you don't have access to this team
schedule.accessDeniedDesc: You don't have access to this team's schedule
schedule.teamNotFoundLong: The team you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have permission to view its schedule.

alerts.exported: Schedule exported to PDF! Please check your Downloads folder.

hostTeamAvailability.remindNone: No reminders sent — everyone who needs to submit has entered at least one availability for this month.
hostTeamAvailability.remindNoShifts: Add at least one shift type to this team before sending reminders.
hostTeamAvailability.remindPartial: Some issues: {failed} failed, {skipped} skipped (no email on file).
hostTeamAvailability.remindFailed: Could not send reminders. Please try again.
